problems.cause: AGREE annex syntax error: 'var' keyword is not allowed in component type annex; only 'eq', 'assume', and 'guarantee' are permitted at top level in type-level annexes.
problems.minimal_edit: Remove 'var heating_request : bool;' and 'var cooling_request : bool;' lines; inline the expressions directly in the guarantee clauses.

executor_steps: Rewrite line 91 as: 'eq heating_request = (user_request.heater_on and not user_request.cooler_on);' → delete this line entirely and inline the expression into the guarantee on line 93
Rewrite line 92 as: 'eq cooling_request = (user_request.cooler_on and not user_request.heater_on);' → delete this line entirely and inline the expression into the guarantee on line 94
Replace guarantee on line 93 with: 'guarantee "heater_on_condition": heater_on => ((user_request.heater_on and not user_request.cooler_on) and tempin <= 20);'
Replace guarantee on line 94 with: 'guarantee "cooler_on_condition": cooler_on => ((user_request.cooler_on and not user_request.heater_on) and tempin > 0);'
